title: Galangal Crumble
description: A sour and crumbly one-pot meal featuring galangal, cooked in an air fryer for a raw-friendly dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together galangal, lime juice, onion, garlic, red curry paste, and salt.
Gradually add water while mixing until you achieve a pourable consistency.
Pour the mixture into an air fryer pan. If using a regular frying pan, make sure it is non-stick or coated to prevent sticking.
Cook in 375°F (190°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until the top has started to crisp and turn golden brown.
While the galangal crumble is cooking, mix sesame oil with sesame seeds. Once done, sprinkle over the top of the crumble before serving.
